notes: W5.4 regression check. Fresh CDP Page.navigate to https://www.notion.com/chat -> redirected to https://www.notion.so/login?redirectURL=%2Fchat (title 'Notion - 로그인'), then TWO cache-bypass hard reloads (Page.reload ignoreCache=true) with hydration waits (nav 6s+20s poll, reload1 8s+20s poll, reload2 8s+25s poll). ALL THREE loads landed on the Notion LOGIN WALL — the session is now logged out, so /chat redirects to the email/SSO sign-in page. No 차단 / 보안 정책 / 민감 text anywhere in DOM (hasBlock=false, hasPolicy=false, hasSensitive=false, titleHasBlock=false); the page-LOAD whole-page block did NOT fire. Probe stable across nav + both reloads: bodyLen 198/343/198, snippet='콘텐츠로 건너뛰기 / 나만의 AI 워크스페이스 / Notion 계정에 로그인 / 이메일 ...' (login form: 계속, Google/Apple/Microsoft/패스키/SSO, New user? Sign up), editorCount=0, editorFound=false. The chat composer NEVER hydrated (no contenteditable/textarea behind the login wall), so the PII prompt could NOT be typed or submitted (submitted=false); no user-message bubble, no engine WS round-trip, no '차단' warning surfaced (msgCount=0). path=composer_never_hydrated. Screenshot 01_notion_not_hydrated.png confirms the '나만의 AI 워크스페이스 / Notion 계정에 로그인' sign-in screen. This is the TRUE notion baseline FAIL_NOT_RENDERED outcome class — the chronic 'composer never reaches a typeable chat' failure (#1139/#1148/#1165/#1183/#1184/#1212/#1233/#1254/#1297/#1319/#1340/#1363). NOTE the proximate cause differs from #1363: #1363 stalled on an anonymous 'Notion AI' hydration collapse (record-map injection), whereas #1381 redirects to a LOGIN WALL (session logged out). Either way the engine WS path is never exercised. NOT a regression of W5.4: notion is NOT the W5.4 key validator (character on ws_json id=31 is). The W5.4 character-add-turn migration to DB-driven emit_ws_envelope cannot affect notion because no chat round-trip ever begins here — engine_intercept_fired=no, page NOT replaced, no engine response in DOM, parent_candidate_id empty-case never reached. Outcome identical class to W5.0/W5.1/W5.2/W5.3 baseline (#1297/#1319/#1340/#1363) as expected: non-discriminating indicator. If a logged-in notion validation is required, a separate authenticated session is needed (cf logged-in #1346 family for the WS builder).
